titleStmt.title: SII 15.218: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 218. (B.K. No. 155 of 1926-27.) BENTŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the temple of Śaṁbhuliṅga.
This is dated the 15th regnal year of the king, Krōdhana Pushya śu. 8, Monday, corresponding to 1205 A.D., December 19, Monday, f.d.t. °67.

It records a gift of money by Sōmayya out of the interest from which were to be made offerings to the god Svayambhu Kalidēva on every Monday. The epigraph is engraved in two sections one below the other with an intervening space wherein is incised a record of Siṅghaṇa (No. 161 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© nama namaḥ sivāya namaḥ . śrīmatu pratāpacakra
va¨rtti śrī vīraballāḷdēvara vi(va)¨rṣada 15 neya krōdhana saṁvatsarada
puśya su 8 sōmavāradaṁdu . śrī svayaṁbhu kallidēva¨rgge
sōmavāra sōmavāradappade hālumaṁḍageya

namaḥ sivāyaḥ śrīmatu pratāpacakrava¨rtti vīraballāḷadēva va
¨rṣada 15 neya krōdhana saṁvatsarada pusya sōmavāradaṁdu śrī
svayaṁbhudēvarige sōmavāra sōmavāradappade dēvarāḷu sōma
ya koṭṭa paṇavoṁdakkaṁ bēḷe vaḍḍiyalu Upahāravaṁ naḍasuvaru
Digital edition of SII 15.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
